articles.summary: The article is well-structured, detailed, and includes appropriate local clinic information. Metadata is strong, the CTA is clear with correct contact details, and content avoids generic hype or AI-sounding phrases. Minor improvements for smoother flow and occasional wording refinements could be considered but are not blocking.

The article is well-structured, informative, and tailored to the local context with accurate business data. Metadata is complete and relevant. There are minor issues with a misplaced lowercase letter and minor wording repetition, but no critical blockers. The CTAs are clear and natural, and there is good balance without AI-hype or filler. Overall the article is suitable for publishing with only minor polish recommended.

The article on dental implants is comprehensive, well-structured, and well-tailored to the Portobello, Dublin location with the explicit clinic details included. Metadata is complete and descriptive. The tone is professional and informative without AI-sounding hype or filler. The CTAs are natural, relevant, and non-repetitive. Minor improvements could be made to slightly improve flow and clarify a few sections.
